reviews.owner_response: Response from the owner 20 hours agoWe are so pleased with your comments and enjoyed our food! Thank you so much for taking time to review us! Hope to see you again!рЯЩП вА¶

reviews.text:
Took our teenage nephews here to play the games consoles and have a pizza as a means to occupy the afternoon.
So glad we did as wow this was the best pizza! Genuinely fabulous. We had the phoenix pie and all of us were very happy with it. One of the best pizzas I've ever had. Both nephews said repeatedly was the best pizza they've ever had.
We also had potato tots, Mac and cheese bites as well as chicken strips. OMG the strips were delicious.
Everything really good.
Highly recommend.Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
reviews.owner_response: Response from the owner 20 hours agoThank you so much Gavin! You are very welcome, hope to see you all again soon! рЯЩП вА¶

reviews.text: The best pizza IвАЩve ever tried! Definitely worth the trip after my mate, whoвАЩs been three times now, recommended me Impasto. Absolutely delicious and I canвАЩt wait to go back in a few weeks. And Tom, the head chef/owner, is such a sound guy whoвАЩs really passionate about what he does. CanвАЩt recommend this place enough! 10/10Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
reviews.owner_response: Response from the owner a week agoThank you so much for your review! You are very welcome! Hope to see you again soon! рЯЩПрЯЩП вА¶

reviews.text: Seemed expensive per pizza but they are not usual UK sizes. We ordered 2 and had to take a whole one home because of how gigantic they were. Perfectly baked NY style dough base and good toppings.
reviews.owner_response: Response from the owner 3 weeks agoHi Jim, thanks for the review! IвАЩm glad that you enjoyed your pizza! They are gigantic and based on two or more sharing each one, as they are more of a challenge to defeat solo! рЯ§£ hope to see you again! рЯЩП вА¶

reviews.text: Words honestly canвАЩt do this New YorkвАУstyle pizza justice. The dough is cooked to absolute perfection, and you can taste how carefully chosen the ingredients are in every bite. The sides deserve their own shoutout too вАФ the chicken tenders were tender, crispy, and absolutely drenched in the chefвАЩs house sauce (in the best way possible). 10/10 experience, would recommend without hesitationMeal typeDinnerPrice per person¬£20вАУ30Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
